rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF YELENA FRUMKIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Compliance Status Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/8/26. (No earlier availability.) The proof of mailing is incomplete at item 5 (the date the order appointing the conservator was filed.) There is no need to file a Civil proof of service in PROBATE matters; the only correct form of proof of mailing is the one on the reverse side of the MANDATORY Judicial Council Form Notice of Conservatee's Rights.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF QUMRUN N. MONIE
rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF PATRICK TSIE WONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TERMINATE ESTATE (NO ASSETS)
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/14/2026. Issues necessitating a continuance: 1) The petition has no prayer. For the court to make an order, the petition must include a prayer specifying the relief sought. 2) No proposed order has been received (San Francicsco Local Rule 14.7.A). Please amend or supplement the petition to address the above issue and provide a courtesy copy of all further filings to this examiner no later than 01/05/2026 to avoid additional continuance.
